content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Verified all three amendments against production code in src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs (materialize_bundle), src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs, and src/adapters/br_process.rs. Each identifies a real defect in the e2e fixture: (1) the bead-graph topology cannot be produced by the real exporter, which always creates a separate milestone-root and per-workstream epics and turns proposal.depends_on into Blocks edges; (2) br mutations never propagate to .beads/issues.jsonl on disk and the BV --robot-next response is frozen at construction time, leaving combined br/fs/bv tests internally inconsistent; (3) the mock only matches one smoke-test literal create/close shape and would be exhausted by the real BrMutationAdapter create_bead (which adds --labels/--description) and the real success_reconciliation close (which uses --reason=task ... completed successfully). Accepting all three.

## Votes

- `fr-6-33f2412a`: Accept
  Verified at service.rs:1577-1759: production materialization creates a distinct milestone-root bead, distinct workstream epics, parent_child edges from tasks to their workstream epic, and Blocks edges from proposal.depends_on. The fixture instead reuses ROOT_EPIC_ID as both a proposal and the exported root, and maps depends_on==ROOT_EPIC_ID to parent_child (line 310). That topology is unreachable from the real exporter, so integration assertions can pass against a graph production code can never produce. Real correctness defect.
- `fr-6-57a7075f`: Accept
  Verified: ScenarioBrState only mutates an in-memory Vec behind Arc<Mutex>, while .beads/issues.jsonl is written once during workspace construction and never rewritten on create/close. MockBvAdapter (lines 389-401) captures next_bead_json(prepare_issue) at build time and returns it unconditionally for every --robot-next, so it cannot advance after the prepare task is closed. Any reconciliation/controller test that combines br mutations with filesystem or BV reads will see inconsistent state. Legitimate consistency defect for the fixture's stated purpose.
- `fr-6-f5ea8f87`: Accept
  Verified: response_for_call (lines 555-578) only matches a 4-arg create with the exact title/type/priority literals and a 3-arg close with --reason=Fixture cleanup. Production BrMutationAdapter::create_bead (br_process.rs:1336-1359) appends --labels=... and --description=... when callers (e.g. propose-new-bead at service.rs:4583-4590) supply them, producing a 5-6 arg call. success_reconciliation.rs:479 builds reason `task {task_id} completed successfully`. Both production shapes fail to match this mock and return None, exhausting the dispatcher rather than exercising the workflow. Real defect for any test wiring this fixture into the production adapters.
